title: No Entity Movement
description: Remove movement from Mobs through nametags.
body:
# NoMove
This simple yet powerful mod allows players to stop the movement of any mob in the game using a special nametag called "**nomove**". Once a mob is named with this tag, it will remain **completely still**, effectively freezing it in place **(except for gravity)**. This mod is perfect for creating static displays or adding a unique twist to your world by controlling mob movement. 

Whether you're a builder, map creator, or just looking for a fun way to control your mobs, the "NoMove" mod offers an easy and effective solution to keep any mob in place.

## How to use it:
1. Simply name a nametag: "**nomove**" in an anvil.
2. Give the nametag to the mob you want to freeze.

Keep in mind that the named mob **won't move or face in another direction** until you give the mob another name.
